description_long: This is a whimsical, cartoon-like stuffed toy with a rounded, plump body and a large head. Its body and head are primarily light pink, with a prominent purple spot on its forehead and a larger purple patch on its belly. The toy has two large, pointed ears on each side of its head, and its face features wide, expressive eyes, thick black eyebrows, and a broad, mischievous smile. The arms are short and outstretched, ending in white, mitten-like hands with three fingers each. The back of the toy is plain, with no additional markings or features, and the overall surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys.
description: A light pink, cartoonish stuffed toy with large ears, a purple belly patch, and a playful facial expression. Its arms are outstretched and it has a soft, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toy's expressive face, purple forehead spot, purple belly patch, and outstretched arms with white hands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the toy's profile, ear shape, and the thickness of its body and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, light pink back and the symmetrical placement of the ears and arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and the rounded shape of the toy.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon fantasy creature with large ears and purple markings
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and mischievous, with wide, open eyes, thick black eyebrows, and a broad, curved smile.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms outstretched to the sides and head facing forward.
